noticia.titulo: Dive Into the 70s-Inspired Psychedelic Horror ‘Exophoria’ from Bayview Entertainment
noticia.texto_resumido: BayView Entertainment invites horror fans to step into a psychedelic purgatory with the release of Exophoria, a chilling new vision from filmmaker Kerry McArthur. In a secluded mountain town, a young doctor—haunted by her own past trauma—encounters two comatose teenagers.
